plugins.description: Streamlined engineering workflow skills — merged from superpowers + agent-skills, optimized for token efficiency (~93% reduction). 10 skills: mao-brainstorm, mao-plan, mao-execute, mao-debug, mao-tdd, mao-review, mao-ship, mao-secure, mao-optimize.
